reviews.review_description: But this game is dead. Every time I draw in a public.I see nobody itis this game dead

I first played this game when it was first published and have loved it sence and stoped for a bit and got back into cc when evidence owned the game and quit because some staff didn’t try and fix gliches but I’m glad to see the game up and looking better then ever and fro devs if you read this it’s GOZBeebles I wonder if mrj20 remembers me

reviews.review_title: Feels like I traveled back in time.
reviews.review_description: Back to playing the same amazing game from 2 years ago, absolute peak.
I'm so happy I got to play this game again. Everything looks the same, and it's so fun. Thank you, owners, for making this experience so enjoyable.
